hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.flex) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && echo 'JFlex source changed — regenerating lexer...' >&2 && ./gradlew generatePhelLexer --quiet 2>&1 | tail -3 >&2 ;; *.bnf) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && echo 'BNF grammar changed — regenerating parser...' >&2 && ./gradlew generatePhelParser --quiet 2>&1 | tail -3 >&2 ;; esac; exit 0
